_doc: T2.9 chronicle-lite: name phonology, event thresholds, and prose templates. ALL TUNE data (D-006). Templates may reference ONLY the placeholders documented per event - every clause traces to a recorded magnitude; the renderer throws on an unknown placeholder (no invented facts by construction).

phonology._doc: One placeholder culture. Names are onset+nucleus(+coda) syllables; deterministic from world seed + settlement id (splitmix64 mixing, ADR-001: registry entries, never sim rows).

thresholds._doc: Data-driven threshold functions over observable rows. Two-sided rigs in ChronicleTests pin each one: just-below must not fire, at-or-above must.

templates._doc: Placeholders per event: founding {year} {name} {population}; famineOnset {year} {name} {deficitPct}; famineEnd {year} {name} {years} {deaths}; extinction {year} {name} {lastPopulation}; firstArtisans {year} {name} {count}; migrationSurge {year} {name} {count} {sharePct}.
templates.founding: In the year {year}, {name} was founded, {population} souls strong.
templates.famineOnset: In {year}, famine gripped {name}: {deficitPct} of every hundred measures of need went unmet.
templates.famineEnd: In {year}, the famine at {name} lifted after {years} years; {deaths} were dead of it.
templates.extinction: In {year}, {name} fell silent - the last {lastPopulation} souls perished, and no smoke rose again.
templates.firstArtisans: In {year}, the first artisans set up their workshops at {name}, {count} masters and hands.
templates.migrationSurge: In {year}, {count} souls quit {name} in a single season - {sharePct} of every hundred who lived there.
